div.head: Memorandum by the Chairman of the Commission of Neutrals (White)
div.p: The Bolivian Minister called and asked if the Neutral Commission was going to have a meeting and call in the neighboring countries. I told him that we were still waiting to hear from Argentina, Chile, and Brazil. The Minister was very insistent that now was the time for us to have a meeting and I made it clear to him that we are not in conflict with the League proposals and that I personally hoped Bolivia would accept the latest League proposal.
